german_requirement.title: German Language Skills Are Not Essential
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility but also a notable classification gap.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Customer-Facing Roles Close Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A narrow gap indicates a strong presence of generalist PMs in the market.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: Senior positions account for 60% of the workforce, significantly outpacing mid and junior roles.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates with Limited Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, with minimal remote or hybrid options available.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: All opportunities are located in Berlin, with no remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Workforce
ai.subtitle: Only 15% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities or require AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
